[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100100 3
1 1111111 a
2 0000000 a
3 0010101 3
4 0000010 1
5 1010011 4
6 0010011 3
7 0001110 3

01 10 0010111 4
12 21 1010011 4 match 5
23 32 1010011 4 match 5
34 43 0011111 5
45 54 1101111 6
56 65 1101101 5
67 76 1111111 a match 1
70 07 1111111 a match 1

02 20 1010111 5
13 31 0010011 3 match 6
24 42 1011111 6
35 53 1111011 6
46 64 1101110 5
57 75 1111111 a match 1
60 06 1110101 5
71 17 1111111 a match 1

03 30 0010111 4
14 41 0001110 3 match 7
25 52 1111011 6
36 63 1110111 6
47 74 1111111 a match 1
50 05 1111101 6
61 16 1100110 4
72 27 1111111 a match 1

04 40 0011111 5
15 51 1101011 5
26 62 1110111 6
37 73 1111111 a match 1
